-- 4 of 10 --

Before we dig into the nitty gritty and crack open our
ad accounts and spreadsheet calculators, I want to
clear a few things up, so that together, we can get
smarter about Facebook Ads.
LESSON:
SETUP: GETTING SMARTER
ABOUT FB ADS
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
Where You Might Be At Now: 	Where We Will Be At The End of This Module:
• 	Facebook is $h!t and doesn’t work for me.
• 	I need immediate results today.
• 	I can’t afford to pour money into this without a
system of evaluation.
• 	I am ready to either hire someone internally or work
with an outside team/agency.
• 	I launched campaigns but turned them off since
they stopped working.
• 	Facebook is a tool that produces outputs after WE
give it clear input.
• 	Facebook will produce results as soon as it learns
from our tests.
• 	I have a system of evaluating performance.
• 	I am ready to manage my campaigns before
handing it off with understanding of how Facebook
works.
• 	I will continuously iterate on successful campaigns
as some will stop working and others will perform
extremely well.
What to Expect From Me:
Foundations
• 	Facebook is a Tool
• 	Delayed Gratification
• 	Easy Money
• 	Setting Up Your View
• 	Deep Dive Into Various Views
• 	Understanding Your Metrics
Growth
• 	Prospecting
• 	Testing
• 	Evergreen
• 	Scaling Approaches
• 	Creative Breakdown
•
• 	Remarketing
• 	Structure
• 	Creative Breakdown

-- 6 of 10 --

Things Are Not Getting Easier… But We Can
Get Smarter…
Future Gratification Model
Anti-money grab mentality and using Facebook as a tool for showcasing your brand.
I’ve been fortunate enough to work with over 150 brands in some capacity of paid media - whether through
consultation, direct management, or teaching their internal teams.
Through this – the ones that are still around today have adopted a focus of less “hacks” and tactics, and
developed an iterative FRAMEWORK to find their VIP customers and treat them as such.
